subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws.
source_quote: A seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight.
source_quote: though he appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: He holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has a long-standing interest in Felkur stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass explains he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expresses admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses Maram il Vass's deal.
source_quote: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause in the contract.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: acquired from fire giants

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is lowered to safety by the Owlbear after his cage is freed.
source_quote: The Owlbear then held to lower him safely

subject: Daein
fact: Daein provides bardic inspiration to Felkur during the negotiation.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognizes the Chasme Demons' properties.
source_quote: Daein recognizes the Chasme Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein shouts for the drow prisoner during the battle.
source_quote: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses his sap ability to give the Chasme Demon disadvantage on an attack against Akritas.
source_quote: misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts Spiritual Weapon near another demon.
source_quote: Spiritual Weapon near another

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: A Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim.
source_quote: So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark

subject: Akritas
fact: A Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas.
source_quote: I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear prepares an attack.
source_quote: The Owlbear prepares an attack

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacks a flying Chasme Demon with its claws, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear grabs the chain and prepares to lower the prisoner, Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The Owlbear grabs the chain and prepares to lower the prisoner, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Hags
fact: Three hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners.
source_quote: Three hags who arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners

subject: Hags
fact: The hags muttered about the difficulty of finding good hired help.
source_quote: muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Two Chasme Demons appear and are identified by the party through Arcana checks.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appear, identified by the party through Arcana checks

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim.
source_quote: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas.
source_quote: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons have magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, and immunity to poison.
source_quote: magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons communicate telepathically with polyphonic, buzzing, clicking voices.
source_quote: communicate telepathically with polyphonic, buzzing, clicking voices

subject: Maram il Vass's Office
fact: Maram il Vass's office is an opulent chamber filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures.
source_quote: An opulent chamber within Maram il Vass's palace, filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room is adjacent to Maram il Vass's office.
source_quote: A room adjacent to Maram il Vass's office

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room contains shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels.
source_quote: containing shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room has a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: and a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens are a vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall.
source_quote: A vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens are lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination.
source_quote: lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Most cages in the Hanging Gardens are occupied by a single prisoner.
source_quote: most occupied by a single prisoner

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the area

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed.
source_quote: A location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed

subject: Armor Sets
fact: Two sets of armor were magically created by Felkur using his abilities.
source_quote: Two sets of armor magically created by Felkur using his abilities

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The armor sets were fabricated to appear as if they came from bandit camps and a raided castle.
source_quote: claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The armor sets were presented as payment for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: presented as payment for the drow prisoner

subject: Key
fact: A key was given to the party by Maram il Vass to access the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A key given to the party by Maram il Vass to access the Hanging Gardens

subject: Key
fact: The party takes the key after Maram il Vass unlocks the door and leaves.
source_quote: The party takes it after Maram il Vass unlocks the door and leaves

subject: Chains
fact: Large, heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern.
source_quote: Large, heavy chains running the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern

subject: Chains
fact: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage.
source_quote: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: Magical Item
fact: Maram il Vass desires an item of 'no material consequence' that he tasks Felkur with retrieving.
source_quote: An item of 'no material consequence' that Maram il Vass desires and tasks Felkur with retrieving

subject: Contract
fact: The contract is a magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures.
source_quote: A magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures

subject: Contract
fact: The contract was meticulously crafted by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: meticulously crafted by Maram il Vass

subject: Contract
fact: Felkur refined the contract to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses.
source_quote: further refined by Felkur during negotiations to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses

subject: Contract
fact: The contract includes a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement.
source_quote: a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement

subject: Contract
fact: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: acquired from fire giants

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries and inquires about the encounter with the demons.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries and inquires about the encounter with the demons

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed and suggests he may need new guardians.
source_quote: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed and suggests he may need new guardians

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location.
source_quote: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: The contract is finalized.
source_quote: The contract is finalized

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon, which is halved due to its resistance.
source_quote: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon, which is halved due to its resistance

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: One Chasme Demon flies toward Bramgrim, and the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon flies toward Bramgrim, and the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: A Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses.
source_quote: A Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: Daein attacks a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks.
source_quote: Daein attacks a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: Felkur continues to attack with Firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur continues to attack with Firebolt

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Battle with Chasme Demons
fact: The Chasme Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Graz'zt's Chosen
fact: Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed in Hillsfar.
source_quote: where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed

subject: Stolen Item
fact: Maram il Vass's interest in Felkur stems from a stolen item.
source_quote: stemming from a stolen item
